title: CA Foundation / Commerce Competitive Plugin
description: Targeted modules for CA Foundation, CMA Foundation, and Commerce competitive exams aligned with Class 12 Commerce stream
copyrightDisclaimer: © Textbook content belongs exclusively to its respective authors and authorities. IIS Academy content offers enhancement, supplemental insights, and technology-powered add-ons. Use strictly for educational purposes.

modules.subject: Accountancy
patternRecognition: CA loves: Partnership reconstitution — goodwill calculation, new/sacrificing/gaining ratio
CA loves: Company final accounts — Schedule III format of Balance Sheet
CA loves: Ratio analysis — current ratio, quick ratio, debt-equity ratio interpretations
CA loves: Cash flow vs profit reconciliation — depreciation, working capital changes
calculationHacks: Goodwill = Super Profit × Years' Purchase; Super Profit = Actual Profit − Normal Profit
Normal Profit = Capital Employed × Normal Rate of Return / 100
Current Ratio < 1 → potential liquidity crisis; > 3 → inefficient use of current assets
mnemonicAgents: DEAR = Debit Expenses Assets Receivables (accounts that increase with Debit)
CLIP = Credits Liabilities Income Payables (accounts that increase with Credit)
For Partnership: 'GRAINS' = Goodwill Revaluation Asset-value Income Nominal capital Split

intelligenceAgeApplication.title: Cloud Accounting & AI Bookkeeping
intelligenceAgeApplication.content: Modern accounting software (Tally, QuickBooks, Zoho Books) automates journal entries using AI. Startups like ClearTax raised ₹1,000 crore by automating GST filing. CA professionals who understand both traditional accounting AND digital tools command 40% higher salaries. Your Class 12 accountancy is the foundation — but knowing the technology layer is the edge.

modules.subject: Business Studies
patternRecognition: CA loves: Indian Contract Act — valid offer, acceptance, consideration, capacity
CA loves: Sale of Goods Act — implied conditions and warranties
CA loves: Companies Act — types of companies, Directors' duties, winding up
CA loves: SEBI regulations — market manipulation, insider trading
mnemonicAgents: VALID CONTRACT: VAALCO = Valid offer, Accepted, Agreement, Legal, Consideration, One free will
SEBI POWERS: 'PASS' = Prohibit, Adjudicate, Suspend, Scrutinise

modules.subject: Economics
patternRecognition: CA Foundation loves: Price elasticity — perfectly elastic, inelastic, unit elastic interpretations
CA Foundation loves: Cost curves — relationship between TC, MC, AC
CA Foundation loves: Market structures — perfect competition vs monopoly profit maximisation
CA Foundation loves: Fiscal and monetary policy tools
calculationHacks: Price Elasticity of Demand = (% change in Qd) / (% change in P) — negative value indicates normal good
MC = ΔTC/ΔQ — slope of TC curve
Profit maximisation: always at MR = MC
mnemonicAgents: ELASTIC DEMAND factors: 'SCANT' = Substitutes, Cross-price, Affordability, Necessity vs luxury, Time
MC = MR = AR = P in Perfect Competition at long-run equilibrium
